mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.slug, p.type, p.title, p.description, p.content, p.published_at, p.created_at, p.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_views WHERE post_id = p.id) AS view_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = p.id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE post_id = p.id) AS comment_count FROM posts p WHERE p.slug = #{slug}
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM posts WHERE slug = #{slug})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (slug, type, title, description, content, published_at) VALUES (#{slug}, #{type}, #{title}, #{description}, #{content}, #{publishedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_views WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_likes (post_id, session_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{sessionId}) ON CONFLICT (post_id, session_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND session_id = #{sessionId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND session_id = #{sessionId})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT id, post_id, author_name, content, created_at FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, author_name, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{authorName}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId}
